sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4953" key="a)mareu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμαρ-εύω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀμάρα</etym>) <sense id="n4953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flow off,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
